incident_summary: Portal authentication service experienced a full outage for approximately 50 minutes due to session-service-prod becoming unreachable, preventing customer logins while core threat detection remained operational

root_cause.summary: session-service-prod became unreachable, blocking SSO token validation required for portal authentication
root_cause.mechanism: Portal auth service depends on session-service-prod for SSO token validation; when session service became unreachable at internal endpoint, all authentication requests failed

customer_impact.description: Customers were unable to log into the security portal for approximately 50 minutes. All login attempts failed during this period. Email threat detection and processing continued operating normally throughout the incident.
affected_functionality: Access to portal dashboard and UI
unaffected_functionality: Email threat detection and processing (IES pipeline confirmed operational)

resolution.confirmed_by: CloudWatch log message 'session-service-prod connection restored, auth requests resuming' at 10:00 UTC; Prometheus metrics showing portal_auth_response_latency_seconds returned to baseline 0.22s at 10:00 UTC; engineer confirmation 'portal fully accessible again' at 10:05 UTC

root_cause: CloudWatch logs showing repeated 'session-service-prod unreachable' errors starting 09:10 UTC
Slack message from bob.sre at 09:20: 'logs show session-service-prod is unreachable, that's the auth backend'
Resolution confirmed by pod restart followed by service restoration
timeline: onset_time: First CloudWatch ERROR log at 09:10:00Z
mitigation_time: CloudWatch INFO log 'Restarting session-service-prod pod' at 09:45:00Z
recovery_time: CloudWatch INFO log 'connection restored' and Prometheus metrics baseline recovery at 10:00:00Z
customer_impact: Slack messages from carol.dev at 09:14: 'getting SSO failures on login page - portal is down'
Slack message from bob.sre at 09:15: 'IES detection is still running - emails are being processed normally'
Slack message from bob.sre at 10:05: 'Detection was unaffected the entire time - only portal login was impacted'
Prometheus metrics showing ies_emails_processed_total remained stable at baseline ~4.5e+03 throughout incident
Prometheus metrics showing portal_auth_response_latency_seconds spiked from 0.2s baseline to 9.5-14s during incident

data_gaps: Root cause of why session-service-prod became unreachable is not explained in available data - only that it failed and required restart
Geographic scope unknown - logs reference 'prod-us-east-1' but no confirmation whether other regions were affected or if service is single-region
Number of affected customers or failed login attempts not quantified
Whether session-service-prod experienced a crash, network partition, resource exhaustion, or other specific failure mode is not documented
